brief.title: Hayward / San Leandro Fleet Leads — SMS + Email Drafts
brief.description: Per-lead SMS and email drafts for NorCal CARB Mobile Clean Truck Check outreach. Schedule SMS for Saturday 2026-05-23 10:30 AM PT unless sending manually.
brief.dedupeWarning: NOT yet deduped against Master CRM. Verify in Sheet before calling — some may already be customers.

sms.body: Hi—Bryan w/ NorCal CARB Mobile. In {{city}} Sat doing mobile Clean Truck Checks (diesel 14k+ lbs): OBD $75 + OVI smoke opacity, same trip. 24/7, 363 days/yr. Call before CA does: 415-900-8563

email.subject: Mobile Clean Truck Check near {{city}} — same-trip fleet testing
email.bodyPlainText:
Hi {{contactName}},

I'm Bryan with NorCal CARB Mobile. I'll be in {{city}} this Saturday doing Clean Truck Checks for fleets in your area.

If you run diesels over 14,000 lbs, we can knock yours out on the same trip:
• Mobile OBD emissions testing — $75/vehicle
• OVI smoke opacity testing — $250/vehicle
• Fleet discounts and flexible scheduling

We come to your yard — 24/7 service, 363 days a year.

Book or request a fleet quote: https://norcalcarbmobile.com/book-schedule-carb-smoke-test-sacramento
Or call/text: 415-900-8563

Call me before the State calls you.

Thanks,
Bryan
NorCal CARB Mobile
bryan@norcalcarbmobile.com
https://norcalcarbmobile.com

templates.voicemail: Hey [Name], Bryan with NorCal CARB Mobile. I'll be in [city] tomorrow doing Clean Truck Checks for fleets right by you. If you've got diesels over 14,000 lbs I can knock yours out same trip — mobile OBD and OVI smoke opacity, 24/7, 363 days a year. Call me before the State calls you. 415-900-8563.

callHandling.rule: If they yell or push back, don't argue. Take ownership, say Bryan will handle it, log the call, move on.
callHandling.opening: Hi, this is Camila — I'm calling for Bryan with NorCal CARB Mobile. He's doing mobile Clean Truck Checks in your area this week. Is this a good time for thirty seconds?

ifYelledAt.say: I hear you — I'm sorry about that. I'll note this and have Bryan take care of it personally. Would you prefer he calls you directly, or should I take you off our list?
doNot: Keep pitching after they say stop
ifYelledAt.gumptionOutcome: Callback if they want Bryan; Not Fit if they want off the list
ifYelledAt.notesTemplate: Hostile — Camila de-escalated. Bryan to follow up: [what they said]

callHandling.handoffToBryan: Bryan will call you back from 415-900-8563 — usually same day.

emailDraftsInBryanInbox.method: Gmail — create 22 drafts via filter or manual paste from briefs/hayward-leads-email-drafts.md
emailDraftsInBryanInbox.note: Lead list has phones only; email drafts are for when you find ops/dispatch emails on call or Google Business.

smsSchedule.fallback: Twilio Messaging Service ScheduleMessage with SendAt=1779557400
smsSchedule.note: Stagger 30s between numbers to avoid rate limits; HOT tier first.

steps: Set outcome after each call: No Answer / Callback / Booked / Not Fit
